tasks.prompt: Open the public dashboard and identify the active gate.
Open the Production Academy and switch between training and production mode.
Explain source, candidate, master and gate without outside help.
Explain why training completion is not production approval.
Locate LR5.1 Ricco and state the source, conflict and candidate counts.
Name the exact decision required before one Ricco candidate may be generated.
Explain what LR3 delete and restore proves.
Explain what LR4 proves and what remains REVIEW_REQUIRED.
Open one production template and identify its required deliverables.
List the contents of a complete handoff package.
Explain why Growth OS remains isolated.
State when 10/10 PRODUCTION_READY may be claimed.

closureRule: PR2 or PR10 may close only after this record is completed, reviewed by a second person, tied to an exact commit and followed by a separate public closure proof.
